args:
set -e

tar xf /deps/source/source -C /tmp
cd /tmp/m4-*

CC=/deps/seed/bin/gcc \
AR=/deps/seed/bin/ar \
RANLIB=/deps/seed/bin/ranlib \
CFLAGS="-O2" \
LDFLAGS="-static" \
./configure --prefix=/ --disable-dependency-tracking

make -j$(nproc)

mkdir -p $OUT/bin
cp src/m4 $OUT/bin/m4
chmod +x $OUT/bin/m4
